[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [layering](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeLayer](../../TextmodeLayer.md) / opacity

# Method: opacity()

```ts
opacity(opacity?): number | void;
```

Set or get this layer's opacity.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `opacity?` | `number` | Opacity from `0` to `1`. |

## Returns

`number` \| `void`

Current opacity when called without arguments.

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="opacity" encoded-code="-" />
